text:
was a member of the 104th Cadet Corps who fought in the battle for Trost District.

Appearance

Milieus Zeremski was of average height with bluish-gray eyes and ash blond hair. He wore the typical uniform of a member of the 104th Cadet Corps.

Personality

Milieus seemed shy and cautious; he warned Eren when he was running off to avenge Thomas Wagner for fear of his safety and inexperience. However, he showed bravery when charging in with his squad to save his comrade.

Story

Humanity's Comeback arc

Milieus is among the members of the 104th Cadet Corps during their three year military training period.

The Struggle for Trost arc

During the Struggle for Trost, Milieus is assigned to a middle guard squad in Trost District. Shortly after the squad's deployment, the group is attacked by an abnormal Titan, which results in the death of Thomas Wagner. This causes Eren to attack the abnormal in a rage, despite Milieus' warnings. Eren is injured, and the rest of the squad is killed trying to help him, with Milieus getting caught and eaten by a Titan.

Armin later reports Milieus' demise to the remaining members of the 104th Cadet Corps, saying he died valiantly in the line of duty.

Legacy

Royal Government arc

While speaking to Historia Reiss under the Reiss Chapel, Eren mentions Milieus as being among the victims he and Grisha Jaeger are responsible for killing by stealing the Titan's power.

Trivia

Milieus and Jurgen share the same Japanese voice actor.
